# Policies, coverages, and claims

```{r}
#| label: load-prereqs
#| echo: false
#| message: false

# knitr options
source("_common.R")

```

## Notes 

<embed src="files/ca-1-2a-pdf.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

<embed src="files/ca-1-2b-pdf.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

<embed src="files/ca-1-2c-notes.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>
